aligner.title: Host-subtraction aligner
aligner.description: Tool used for the host-subtraction step.

classifiers.title: Classifiers
classifiers.description: One or more classifiers to run on non-human reads.

kraken_db_url.title: Kraken2 database URL
kraken_db_url.description: URL to a Kraken2 tarball. Auto-downloaded and cached on first run. See https://benlangmead.github.io/aws-indexes/k2 for alternatives (e.g. larger DBs).

metaphlan_index.title: MetaPhlAn index name
metaphlan_index.description: Required if MetaPhlAn is selected. The index is auto-downloaded on first run via metaphlan --install.

sylph_db_url.title: Sylph database URL
sylph_db_url.description: Required if Sylph is selected. URL to a .syldb file (e.g., GTDB-r226 from the Sylph GitHub releases page).

sylph_taxonomy.title: Sylph taxonomy tag
sylph_taxonomy.description: Required if Sylph is selected. Must match the database (e.g., GTDB_r226 for a GTDB-r226 database).
